name: PolycurveGeometryBuilder
summary: The polycurve geometry builder class is in charge of building the geometry list of a polycurve. All the geometries that the builder connects must be connected on the correct end points. The builder has a fluent interface, and can be used as follows: Copyusing Tekla.Structures.Geometry3d; using Tekla.Structures.Model; public class Example { static void Main(string[] args) { var segment = new LineSegment(new Point(0, 0, 0), new Point(1000, 0, 0)); var arc = new Arc(new Point(1000, 0, 0), new Point(2000, 1000, 0), new Point(1707.1, 292.89, 0)); var geometryList = new PolycurveGeometrySolver().Append(arc).Append(segment).GetPolycurve(); var polycurve = new ControlPolycurve(); polycurve.Geometry = geometryList; polycurve.Insert(); } }

constructors.name: PolycurveGeometryBuilder
constructors.summary: Creates an empty geometry builder. This builder contains no geometries

constructors.name: PolycurveGeometryBuilder
constructors.summary: Constructs a geometry builder from an existing geometry list

methods.name: Append(Arc)
methods.summary: Appends an arc to the geometry list

methods.name: Append(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Appends a line segment to the geometry list

methods.name: Append(Polycurve)
methods.summary: Appends another polycurve to the geometry list

methods.name: AppendArc
methods.summary: Appends an arc using three points. The first point is taken as the last point of the last element of the polycurve.

methods.name: AppendSegment
methods.summary: Appends an line segment. The first point is taken as the last point of the last element of the polycurve.

methods.name: AppendTangentArc
methods.summary: Appends an arc tangent to the last curve of the curve list.

methods.name: AppendTangentSegment
methods.summary: Appends a line segment of the given length tangent to the last curve of the list.

methods.name: GetPolycurve
methods.summary: Gets the final geometry after all the modifications made by the builder

methods.name: Prepend(Arc)
methods.summary: Prepends an arc to the geometry list

methods.name: Prepend(LineSegment)
methods.summary: Prepends a line segment to the geometry list

methods.name: PrependArc
methods.summary: Prepends an arc using three points. The last point is taken as the start point of the first element of the polycurve.

methods.name: PrependSegment
methods.summary: Prepends an line segment. The last point is taken as the start point of the first element of the polycurve.

methods.name: PrependTangentArc
methods.summary: Prepends an arc tangent to the first curve of the curve list.

methods.name: PrependTangentSegment
methods.summary: Prepends a line segment of the given length tangent to the first curve of the list.

methods.name: Replace(Int32, Arc)
methods.summary: Replaces the geometry at a given index

methods.name: Replace(Int32, LineSegment)
methods.summary: Replaces the geometry at a given index
